claims.summary: Viscosity must remain legible as temporal persistence, structural drag, and semantic resistance rather than a single linear damping coefficient.
A fixed-versus-viscous comparison at matched entropy should measure whether texture weight is preserved or artificially stiffened.
A pressure-threshold observation should locate where mode packing and semantic trickle diverge before changing admission.
Adding viscosity-driven semantic admission or entropy-driven recovery ceilings would mutate live Minime behavior and requires operator approval.
